# nirvana_instance_type (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nirvana_instance_type" "example_instance_type" {
  region = "us-sva-2"
  name = "n1-standard-8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `region` (String) Available values: "us-sva-1", "us-sva-2", "us-chi-1".

### Read-Only

- `chipset` (String)
- `created_at` (String) When the Instance Type was created.
- `family` (String)
- `memory_gb` (Number)
- `series` (String)
- `updated_at` (String) When the Instance Type was updated.
- `vcpu` (Number)
